enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Mayakamaa Kalakama'?

The song explores themes of life's struggles and emotional turmoil, reflecting on the challenges one faces.

What is the context of this song in the movie Sumaithangi?

In Sumaithangi, the song conveys the protagonist's inner feelings and struggles, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who is the singer of 'Mayakamaa Kalakama'?

The song is beautifully sung by the renowned artist P.B. Sreenivas.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Mayakamaa Kalakama' was composed by the legendary duo Viswanathan–Ramamoorthy.

When was 'Mayakamaa Kalakama' released?

The song was released on December 7, 1970.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Mayakamaa Kalakama', the listener is taken on an emotional journey through the struggles of life and love. The song's poignant lyrics and soulful melody evoke a sense of nostalgia, making it a classic in Tamil cinema. It beautifully captures the essence of heartbreak and longing, resonating with anyone who has faced life's challenges. This timeless piece remains a cherished memory for fans of old Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mayakamaa Kalakama is a timeless melody that resonates with the heart's deepest emotions. This enchanting song from Sumaithangi captures the essence of nostalgia and melancholy, beautifully rendered by the legendary P.B. Sreenivas. With its poignant lyrics by Kannadasan and the masterful composition of Viswanathan–Ramamoorthy, this track is a must-listen for anyone who appreciates classic Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: In life, there will be confusion in the heart, and life will be a struggle.
In life, there will be a thousand doors, and each will have its own pain.
No matter what troubles come, if you stand firm, nothing will defeat you.
If the heart is at peace, everything will be calm until the end.
In life, there will be confusion in the heart, and life will be a struggle.
Make your beautiful heart a palace, and sing a poem day and night.
Tomorrow, seek the path of peace that will lead to him.
Look below you, think of those who are there, and see the land of peace.
In life, there will be confusion in the heart, and life will be a struggle.
